metaData.Key Information: Fights cavities and kills germs that cause bad breath, plaque and gum infection gingivitis
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Rinse with 20ml undiluted Listerine each time, twice a day and expel after rinsing for 30 seconds
• Important:
1. Do not swallow
2. For best results, rinse twice a day
3. This mouthwash is suitable for adults and children 12 years and above

metaData.Key Information:

metaData.Ingredients:
Active ingredients: Eucalyptol (0.099%w/v), Benzoic Acid (0.156%w/v)*, Methyl Salicylate (0.072%w/v), Thymol (0.0702%w/v), Sodium Fluoride (0.0501%w/v), Menthol (0.0425%w/v)
*Quantity based on Benzoic Acid and Sodium Benzoate.
Inactive ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Poloxamer 407, Flavour, Eucalyptol, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Methyl Salicylate, Thymol, Sodium Fluoride, Menthol, Sodium Saccharin, Sucralose, Camellia Sinensis (Green Tea) leaf extract, CI 47005, CI42053.
metaData.Key Information: Listerine Zero has a non-alcohol formula for a less intense taste and kills 99.9% of germs that brushing misses to help prevent bad breath, reduce plaque and gum problems. It has a unique formula with 4 types of essential oils which penetrates to kill bacteria in the plaque bioflim.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Rinse with 20ml undiluted Listerine each time, twice a day and expel after rinsing for 30 seconds
• Important:
1. Do not swallow
2. No further rinse with water is required
3. Children under 6 years of age are not recommended to use

product.name: Listerine Zero Alcohol Mouthwash - Cool Mint

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description: Listerine is the No.1 Mouthwash Worldwide as it is the most advanced and complete mouthwash in the range. Johnson & Johnson calculation based in part on data reported by Nielsen through its Retail Measurement Service for the Mouthwash category for MATs ending July 2015 and July 2016, for the 37 markets globally. Copyright 2014, The Nielsen Company

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Eucalyptol, Zinc Chloride, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Thymol, Methyl Salicylate, Sodium Saccharin, Flavor, Sodium Fluoride, Menthol, Aroma, Sucralose, CI 16035, CI 42090
metaData.Key Information:
Clinically proven to clean and protect with 6 benefits for total oral health:
• Strengthens teeth and helps prevent cavities
• Helps maintain healthy gums
• Helps reduce plaque formation
• Helps keep teeth naturally white by preventing tartar build up
• Kills 99.9% of germs that brushing misses to help prevent bad breath, plaque and gum problems
• Provides fresh breath
metaData.Preparation:
• To Use:
1. Rinse with 200ml (approximately half capful) undiluted Listerine each time, twice a day
2. Expel after rinsing for 30 seconds and do not swallow
3. No further rinse with water is required
• Caution:
1. Do not use in children under 6 years of age
2. In the unlikely event of adverse reaction or accidental swallowing of mouthwash, stop use and seek medical advice

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Xylitol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Benzoic Acid, Eucalyptol, Sodium Benzoate, Methyl Salicylate, Thymol, Flavor, Sodium Saccharin, Sodium Fluoride, Sucralose, Menthol, Ci 16035, Ci 42090. Contains Sodium Fluoride.
metaData.Key Information:
• Fluoride Mouthwash, Mild Taste - Zero alcohol with fluoride for 7X^ cavity protection.
• Used twice daily, Listerine Total Care Cavity Protect Mouthwash helps prevent cavity problems with fluoride and target multiple oral benefits:
1) Whole mouth clean
2) Reaches between teeth
3) Kills 99.9% * of germs
4) Helps prevent cavities
5) Strengthens Teeth
6) Triple action acid protection

* germs that cause bad breath, plaque and gum problems
^ Compared to toothpaste alone. Twice a day for 20 days based on in lab studies
metaData.Preparation: DIRECTION: Use 20mL full strength, rinse the teeth and gums for 30 seconds twice daily as part of usual oral hygiene. Do not swallow.
